自然语言处理

[NLP-0] Can Editing LLMs Inject Harm?
[NLP-0] 编辑LLM会造成伤害吗？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20224
作者: Canyu Chen,Baixiang Huang,Zekun Li,Zhaorun Chen,Shiyang Lai,Xiongxiao Xu,Jia-Chen Gu,Jindong Gu,Huaxiu Yao,Chaowei Xiao,Xifeng Yan,William Yang Wang,Philip Torr,Dawn Song,Kai Shu
关键词-EN: Large Language Models, Language Models, Large Language, Knowledge editing, Misinformation Injection
关键词-ZN: 大型语言模型、语言模型、大型语言、知识编辑、错误信息注入
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: The first two authors contributed equally. 9 pages for main paper, 36 pages including appendix. The code, results, dataset for this paper and more resources are on the project website: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Knowledge editing techniques have been increasingly adopted to efficiently correct the false or outdated knowledge in Large Language Models (LLMs), due to the high cost of retraining from scratch. Meanwhile, one critical but under-explored question is: can knowledge editing be used to inject harm into LLMs? In this paper, we propose to reformulate knowledge editing as a new type of safety threat for LLMs, namely Editing Attack, and conduct a systematic investigation with a newly constructed dataset EditAttack. Specifically, we focus on two typical safety risks of Editing Attack including Misinformation Injection and Bias Injection. For the risk of misinformation injection, we first categorize it into commonsense misinformation injection and long-tail misinformation injection. Then, we find that editing attacks can inject both types of misinformation into LLMs, and the effectiveness is particularly high for commonsense misinformation injection. For the risk of bias injection, we discover that not only can biased sentences be injected into LLMs with high effectiveness, but also one single biased sentence injection can cause a high bias increase in general outputs of LLMs, which are even highly irrelevant to the injected sentence, indicating a catastrophic impact on the overall fairness of LLMs. Then, we further illustrate the high stealthiness of editing attacks, measured by their impact on the general knowledge and reasoning capacities of LLMs, and show the hardness of defending editing attacks with empirical evidence. Our discoveries demonstrate the emerging misuse risks of knowledge editing techniques on compromising the safety alignment of LLMs.
摘要：在大型语言模型中，知识编辑技术被越来越多地用来有效地纠正错误或过时的知识，这是因为从头开始重新培训的成本很高。与此同时，一个关键但未被探讨的问题是：知识编辑能否被用来向低收入国家注入危害？在本文中，我们将知识编辑重新定义为一种新的安全威胁，即编辑攻击，并使用新构建的数据集EditAttack进行了系统的研究。具体地说，我们重点研究了编辑攻击的两个典型的安全风险，包括错误信息注入和偏见注入。对于错误信息注入的风险，我们首先将其分为常识性错误信息注入和长尾错误信息注入。然后，我们发现编辑攻击可以将这两种类型的错误信息注入到LLMS中，其中常识性错误信息注入的有效性尤其高。对于偏向注入的风险，我们发现，偏向句不仅可以被高效地注入到LLMS中，而且一次偏向句注入会导致LLMS的总体输出出现较高的偏向增加，甚至与注入的句子高度无关，这对LLMS的整体公平性造成了灾难性的影响。然后，我们进一步说明了编辑攻击的高度隐蔽性，通过它们对LLM的常识和推理能力的影响来衡量它们，并用经验证据说明了防御编辑攻击的难度。我们的发现表明，知识编辑技术在损害LLMS的安全一致性方面存在新的误用风险。

[NLP-1] QAEA-DR: A Unified Text Augmentation Framework for Dense Retrieval
[NLP-1] QAEA-DR：用于密集检索的统一文本增强框架

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20207
作者: Hongming Tan,Shaoxiong Zhan,Hai Lin,Hai-Tao Zheng,Wai Kin(Victor)Chan
关键词-EN: inaccurate query-text matching, leading to inaccurate, query-text matching, vectors can result, inaccurate query-text
关键词-ZN: 不准确的查询-文本匹配，导致不准确的查询-文本匹配，载体可能会导致不准确的查询-文本
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Information Retrieval (cs.IR)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In dense retrieval, embedding long texts into dense vectors can result in information loss, leading to inaccurate query-text matching. Additionally, low-quality texts with excessive noise or sparse key information are unlikely to align well with relevant queries. Recent studies mainly focus on improving the sentence embedding model or retrieval process. In this work, we introduce a novel text augmentation framework for dense retrieval. This framework transforms raw documents into information-dense text formats, which supplement the original texts to effectively address the aforementioned issues without modifying embedding or retrieval methodologies. Two text representations are generated via large language models (LLMs) zero-shot prompting: question-answer pairs and element-driven events. We term this approach QAEA-DR: unifying question-answer generation and event extraction in a text augmentation framework for dense retrieval. To further enhance the quality of generated texts, a scoring-based evaluation and regeneration mechanism is introduced in LLM prompting. Our QAEA-DR model has a positive impact on dense retrieval, supported by both theoretical analysis and empirical experiments.
摘要：在密集检索中，将长文本嵌入到密集向量中会导致信息丢失，从而导致查询-文本匹配不准确。此外，噪声过大或关键信息稀疏的低质量文本不太可能与相关查询很好地对齐。目前的研究主要集中在改进句子嵌入模型或检索过程上。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种新的文本扩充框架用于密集检索。该框架将原始文档转换为信息密集的文本格式，以补充原始文本，从而在不修改嵌入或检索方法的情况下有效地解决上述问题。通过大型语言模型(LLM)零命中提示生成两种文本表示：问答对和元素驱动事件。我们将这种方法称为QAEA-DR：在一个用于密集检索的文本增强框架中统一问题-答案生成和事件提取。为了进一步提高生成文本的质量，在LLM提示中引入了基于评分的评估和再生机制。我们的QAEA-DR模型对密集检索有积极的影响，理论分析和实证实验都支持这一点。

[NLP-2] Aligning Query Representation with Rewritten Query and Relevance Judgments in Conversational Search CIKM2024
[NLP-2] 对话搜索中的查询表示与重写查询和相关性判断对齐

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20189
作者: Fengran Mo,Chen Qu,Kelong Mao,Yihong Wu,Zhan Su,Kaiyu Huang,Jian-Yun Nie
关键词-EN: supports multi-turn user-system, multi-turn user-system interactions, solve complex information, search supports multi-turn, Conversational search
关键词-ZN: 支持多回合用户系统、多回合用户系统交互、解决复杂信息、搜索支持多回合、对话式搜索
类目: Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted by CIKM 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Conversational search supports multi-turn user-system interactions to solve complex information needs. Different from the traditional single-turn ad-hoc search, conversational search encounters a more challenging problem of context-dependent query understanding with the lengthy and long-tail conversational history context. While conversational query rewriting methods leverage explicit rewritten queries to train a rewriting model to transform the context-dependent query into a stand-stone search query, this is usually done without considering the quality of search results. Conversational dense retrieval methods use fine-tuning to improve a pre-trained ad-hoc query encoder, but they are limited by the conversational search data available for training. In this paper, we leverage both rewritten queries and relevance judgments in the conversational search data to train a better query representation model. The key idea is to align the query representation with those of rewritten queries and relevant documents. The proposed model – Query Representation Alignment Conversational Dense Retriever, QRACDR, is tested on eight datasets, including various settings in conversational search and ad-hoc search. The results demonstrate the strong performance of QRACDR compared with state-of-the-art methods, and confirm the effectiveness of representation alignment.
摘要：会话搜索支持多轮用户-系统交互，以解决复杂的信息需求。与传统的单轮自组织搜索不同，会话搜索遇到了更具挑战性的上下文相关查询理解问题，因为会话历史上下文既长又长。虽然对话式查询重写方法利用显式重写的查询来训练重写模型以将上下文相关的查询转换为独立的搜索查询，但这通常是在不考虑搜索结果的质量的情况下完成的。会话密集检索方法使用微调来改进预先训练的自组织查询编码器，但它们受到可用于训练的会话搜索数据的限制。在本文中，我们利用重写的查询和会话搜索数据中的相关性判断来训练更好的查询表示模型。其关键思想是使查询表示与重写的查询和相关文档的查询表示保持一致。本文提出的模型–查询表示对齐对话密集检索模型QRACDR在八个数据集上进行了测试，包括对话搜索和即席搜索中的各种设置。实验结果表明，QRACDR比现有方法具有更好的性能，也证实了表示对齐的有效性。

[NLP-3] MindSearch: Mimicking Human Minds Elicits Deep AI Searcher
[NLP-3] MindSearch：模仿人类思维激发深度人工智能搜索器

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20183
作者: Zehui Chen,Kuikun Liu,Qiuchen Wang,Jiangning Liu,Wenwei Zhang,Kai Chen,Feng Zhao
关键词-EN: consumes enormous time, Large Language Models, consumes enormous, enormous time, Information seeking
关键词-ZN: 消耗大量时间，大型语言模型，消耗大量时间，信息寻求
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Technical Report. Project Page: https://mindsearch.netlify.app Code: this https URL

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Information seeking and integration is a complex cognitive task that consumes enormous time and effort. Inspired by the remarkable progress of Large Language Models, recent works attempt to solve this task by combining LLMs and search engines. However, these methods still obtain unsatisfying performance due to three challenges: (1) complex requests often cannot be accurately and completely retrieved by the search engine once (2) corresponding information to be integrated is spread over multiple web pages along with massive noise, and (3) a large number of web pages with long contents may quickly exceed the maximum context length of LLMs. Inspired by the cognitive process when humans solve these problems, we introduce MindSearch to mimic the human minds in web information seeking and integration, which can be instantiated by a simple yet effective LLM-based multi-agent framework. The WebPlanner models the human mind of multi-step information seeking as a dynamic graph construction process: it decomposes the user query into atomic sub-questions as nodes in the graph and progressively extends the graph based on the search result from WebSearcher. Tasked with each sub-question, WebSearcher performs hierarchical information retrieval with search engines and collects valuable information for WebPlanner. The multi-agent design of MindSearch enables the whole framework to seek and integrate information parallelly from larger-scale (e.g., more than 300) web pages in 3 minutes, which is worth 3 hours of human effort. MindSearch demonstrates significant improvement in the response quality in terms of depth and breadth, on both close-set and open-set QA problems. Besides, responses from MindSearch based on InternLM2.5-7B are preferable by humans to ChatGPT-Web and this http URL applications, which implies that MindSearch can already deliver a competitive solution to the proprietary AI search engine.
摘要：信息搜索和整合是一项复杂的认知任务，耗费大量的时间和精力。受到大型语言模型显著进步的启发，最近的著作试图通过将LLM和搜索引擎相结合来解决这一问题。然而，这些方法仍然取得了不尽如人意的性能，原因有三：(1)复杂的请求往往无法被搜索引擎准确、完整地检索到；(2)待整合的对应信息散布在多个网页上且噪声巨大；(3)大量内容较长的网页可能很快超过LLMS的最大上下文长度。受人类解决这些问题时的认知过程的启发，我们引入了MindSearch来模拟人类在网络信息搜索和整合中的思维，这可以通过一个简单而有效的基于LLM的多智能体框架来实现。WebPlanner将人类多步信息搜索的心理建模为一个动态的图构建过程：它将用户查询分解为原子子问题作为图中的节点，并基于WebSearcher的搜索结果逐步扩展图。WebSearcher负责每个子问题，通过搜索引擎执行分层信息检索，并为WebPlanner收集有价值的信息。MindSearch的多智能体设计使整个框架能够在3分钟内从更大规模(例如300多个)的网页中并行查找和整合信息，这相当于3个小时的人工努力。MindSearch显示，无论是在封闭集合还是开放集合的QA问题上，无论是深度还是广度，回答质量都有了显著的提高。此外，基于InternLM2.5-7B的MindSearch的响应比ChatGPT-Web和这个http URL应用程序更受欢迎，这意味着MindSearch已经可以为专有的AI搜索引擎提供具有竞争力的解决方案。

[NLP-4] AutoScale: Automatic Prediction of Compute-optimal Data Composition for Training LLMs
[NLP-4] AutoScale：自动预测用于训练LLM的计算机最佳数据成分

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20177
作者: Feiyang Kang,Yifan Sun,Bingbing Wen,Si Chen,Dawn Song,Rafid Mahmood,Ruoxi Jia
关键词-EN: optimal data mixtures, optimal composition, data composition, optimal data composition, LLMs are pretrained
关键词-ZN: 最佳数据混合、最佳组合、数据组合、最佳数据组合、LLM经过预训练
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (stat.ML)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:To ensure performance on a diverse set of downstream tasks, LLMs are pretrained via data mixtures over different domains. In this work, we demonstrate that the optimal data composition for a fixed compute budget varies depending on the scale of the training data, suggesting that the common practice of empirically determining an optimal composition using small-scale experiments will not yield the optimal data mixtures when scaling up to the final model. To address this challenge, we propose AutoScale, an automated tool that finds a compute-optimal data composition for training at any desired target scale. AutoScale first determines the optimal composition at a small scale using a novel bilevel optimization framework, Direct Data Optimization (DDO), and then fits a predictor to estimate the optimal composition at larger scales. The predictor’s design is inspired by our theoretical analysis of scaling laws related to data composition, which could be of independent interest. In empirical studies with pre-training 774M Decoder-only LMs (GPT-2 Large) on RedPajama dataset, AutoScale decreases validation perplexity at least 25% faster than any baseline with up to 38% speed up compared to without reweighting, achieving the best overall performance across downstream tasks. On pre-training Encoder-only LMs (BERT) with masked language modeling, DDO is shown to decrease loss on all domains while visibly improving average task performance on GLUE benchmark by 8.7% and on large-scale QA dataset (SQuAD) by 5.9% compared with without reweighting. AutoScale speeds up training by up to 28%. Our codes are open-sourced.
摘要：为了确保在不同的下游任务集上的性能，LLM通过不同领域的数据混合进行预训练。在这项工作中，我们证明了固定计算预算的最优数据组合取决于训练数据的规模，这表明通过小规模实验经验确定最优组合的常见做法在扩展到最终模型时不会产生最优数据混合。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了AutoScale，这是一种自动化工具，可以为任何期望的目标规模的训练找到计算最优的数据组合。AutoScale首先使用一种新的双层优化框架–直接数据优化(DDO)来确定小规模的最优组成，然后拟合一个预测器来估计较大规模的最优组成。预测器的设计灵感来自于我们对与数据组成相关的缩放规律的理论分析，这可能是独立感兴趣的。在RedPajama数据集上使用预培训774M Decoder-Only LMS(GPT-2 BLAG)进行的经验研究中，AutoScale降低验证困惑的速度比任何基线至少快25%，与没有重新加权的情况相比，速度高达38%，从而实现了跨下游任务的最佳整体性能。在具有掩蔽语言建模的预训练仅编码者LMS(BERT)上，DDO被证明减少了所有领域的损失，同时在GLUE基准上的平均任务性能显著提高了8.7%，在大规模QA数据集(班组)上的平均任务性能比没有重加权的情况下提高了5.9%。AutoScale将培训速度提高高达28%。我们的代码是开源的。

[NLP-5] An Energy-based Model for Word-level AutoCompletion in Computer-aided Translation ACL2024
[NLP-5] 计算机辅助翻译中基于能量的词级自动完成模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20083
作者: Cheng Yang,Guoping Huang,Mo Yu,Zhirui Zhang,Siheng Li,Mingming Yang,Shuming Shi,Yujiu Yang,Lemao Liu
关键词-EN: Computer-aided Translation, Word-level AutoCompletion, context hidden vector, rewarding yet challenging, hidden vector
关键词-ZN: 计算机辅助翻译、单词级自动完成、上下文隐藏载体、有益但具有挑战性、隐藏载体
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted to TACL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Word-level AutoCompletion(WLAC) is a rewarding yet challenging task in Computer-aided Translation. Existing work addresses this task through a classification model based on a neural network that maps the hidden vector of the input context into its corresponding label (i.e., the candidate target word is treated as a label). Since the context hidden vector itself does not take the label into account and it is projected to the label through a linear classifier, the model can not sufficiently leverage valuable information from the source sentence as verified in our experiments, which eventually hinders its overall performance. To alleviate this issue, this work proposes an energy-based model for WLAC, which enables the context hidden vector to capture crucial information from the source sentence. Unfortunately, training and inference suffer from efficiency and effectiveness challenges, thereby we employ three simple yet effective strategies to put our model into practice. Experiments on four standard benchmarks demonstrate that our reranking-based approach achieves substantial improvements (about 6.07%) over the previous state-of-the-art model. Further analyses show that each strategy of our approach contributes to the final performance.
摘要：词级自动补全(WLAC)是计算机辅助翻译中一项富有挑战性的任务。现有的工作通过基于神经网络的分类模型来解决这一任务，该分类模型将输入上下文的隐藏向量映射到其对应的标签(即，候选目标词被视为标签)。由于上下文隐含向量本身没有考虑标签，而是通过线性分类器投影到标签上，因此模型不能充分利用源句中有价值的信息，这最终阻碍了模型的整体性能。为了缓解这一问题，本工作提出了一种基于能量的WLAC模型，该模型使上下文隐藏向量能够从源句中捕获关键信息。不幸的是，训练和推理受到效率和有效性的挑战，因此我们采用了三种简单而有效的策略来将我们的模型付诸实践。在四个标准基准上的实验表明，我们的基于重排序的方法比以前的最先进的模型获得了实质性的改进(约6.07%)。进一步的分析表明，我们的方法中的每一种策略都对最终性能有贡献。

[NLP-6] Investigating the Impact of Semi-Supervised Methods with Data Augmentation on Offensive Language Detection in Romanian Language
[NLP-6] 调查数据增强的半监督方法对罗马尼亚语冒犯性语言检测的影响

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20076
作者: Elena Beatrice Nicola,Dumitru Clementin Cercel,Florin Pop
关键词-EN: Offensive language detection, today digital landscape, online platforms grapple, Offensive language, robust offensive language
关键词-ZN: 攻击性语言检测、当今的数字环境、在线平台格斗、攻击性语言、强大的攻击性语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 10 pages, 3 figures, 28th International Conference on Knowledge-Based and Intelligent Information Engineering Systems

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Offensive language detection is a crucial task in today’s digital landscape, where online platforms grapple with maintaining a respectful and inclusive environment. However, building robust offensive language detection models requires large amounts of labeled data, which can be expensive and time-consuming to obtain. Semi-supervised learning offers a feasible solution by utilizing labeled and unlabeled data to create more accurate and robust models. In this paper, we explore a few different semi-supervised methods, as well as data augmentation techniques. Concretely, we implemented eight semi-supervised methods and ran experiments for them using only the available data in the RO-Offense dataset and applying five augmentation techniques before feeding the data to the models. Experimental results demonstrate that some of them benefit more from augmentations than others.
摘要：攻击性语言检测是当今数字环境中的一项至关重要的任务，在线平台正在努力维护一个相互尊重和包容的环境。然而，构建强大的攻击性语言检测模型需要大量的标记数据，而获取这些数据可能昂贵且耗时。半监督学习通过利用标记和未标记数据来创建更准确和更稳健的模型，提供了一种可行的解决方案。在本文中，我们探索了几种不同的半监督方法以及数据增强技术。具体来说，我们实施了八种半监督方法，并仅使用RO-Offense数据集中的可用数据对它们进行了实验，并在将数据提供给模型之前应用了五种增强技术。实验结果表明，其中一些人比其他人从增强中受益更多。

[NLP-7] Exploring Large Language Models to generate Easy to Read content
[NLP-7] 探索大型语言模型以生成易于阅读的内容

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.20046
作者: Paloma Martínez,Lourdes Moreno,Alberto Ramos
关键词-EN: Easy to Read, Ensuring text accessibility, Read content, Natural Language Processing, Plain Language guidelines
关键词-ZN: 易于阅读、确保文本可访问性、阅读内容、自然语言处理、简单语言指南
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Ensuring text accessibility and understandability are essential goals, particularly for individuals with cognitive impairments and intellectual disabilities, who encounter challenges in accessing information across various mediums such as web pages, newspapers, administrative tasks, or health documents. Initiatives like Easy to Read and Plain Language guidelines aim to simplify complex texts; however, standardizing these guidelines remains challenging and often involves manual processes. This work presents an exploratory investigation into leveraging Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Natural Language Processing (NLP) approaches to systematically simplify Spanish texts into Easy to Read formats, with a focus on utilizing Large Language Models (LLMs) for simplifying texts, especially in generating Easy to Read content. The study contributes a parallel corpus of Spanish adapted for Easy To Read format, which serves as a valuable resource for training and testing text simplification systems. Additionally, several text simplification experiments using LLMs and the collected corpus are conducted, involving fine-tuning and testing a Llama2 model to generate Easy to Read content. A qualitative evaluation, guided by an expert in text adaptation for Easy to Read content, is carried out to assess the automatically simplified texts. This research contributes to advancing text accessibility for individuals with cognitive impairments, highlighting promising strategies for leveraging LLMs while responsibly managing energy usage.
摘要：确保文本的可访问性和可理解性是基本目标，特别是对于有认知障碍和智力障碍的人来说，他们在通过网页、报纸、行政任务或健康文件等各种媒介获取信息时遇到了挑战。像易读性和简明语言指南这样的举措旨在简化复杂的文本；然而，标准化这些指南仍然具有挑战性，而且往往涉及手动过程。这项工作对利用人工智能(AI)和自然语言处理(NLP)方法将西班牙语文本系统地简化为易读格式进行了探索性研究，重点是利用大型语言模型(LLM)来简化文本，特别是在生成易读内容方面。这项研究提供了一个平行的西班牙语语料库，采用了易于阅读的格式，这是培训和测试文本简化系统的宝贵资源。此外，使用LLMS和收集的语料库进行了几个文本简化实验，涉及微调和测试Llama2模型，以生成易于阅读的内容。在便于阅读的文本改编专家的指导下，对自动简化的文本进行了定性评估。这项研究有助于提高认知障碍患者的文本可访问性，突出了在负责任地管理能源使用的同时利用LLMS的有希望的策略。

[NLP-8] Do LLMs Really Adapt to Domains? An Ontology Learning Perspective ISWC2024
[NLP-8] LLM真的能适应域名吗？本体学习的视角

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19998
作者: Huu Tan Mai,Cuong Xuan Chu,Heiko Paulheim
关键词-EN: Large Language Models, natural language processing, Large Language, Language Models, demonstrated unprecedented prowess
关键词-ZN: 大型语言模型、自然语言处理、大型语言、语言模型，展现出前所未有的实力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Accepted at ISWC 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated unprecedented prowess across various natural language processing tasks in various application domains. Recent studies show that LLMs can be leveraged to perform lexical semantic tasks, such as Knowledge Base Completion (KBC) or Ontology Learning (OL). However, it has not effectively been verified whether their success is due to their ability to reason over unstructured or semi-structured data, or their effective learning of linguistic patterns and senses alone. This unresolved question is particularly crucial when dealing with domain-specific data, where the lexical senses and their meaning can completely differ from what a LLM has learned during its training stage. This paper investigates the following question: Do LLMs really adapt to domains and remain consistent in the extraction of structured knowledge, or do they only learn lexical senses instead of reasoning? To answer this question and, we devise a controlled experiment setup that uses WordNet to synthesize parallel corpora, with English and gibberish terms. We examine the differences in the outputs of LLMs for each corpus in two OL tasks: relation extraction and taxonomy discovery. Empirical results show that, while adapting to the gibberish corpora, off-the-shelf LLMs do not consistently reason over semantic relationships between concepts, and instead leverage senses and their frame. However, fine-tuning improves the performance of LLMs on lexical semantic tasks even when the domain-specific terms are arbitrary and unseen during pre-training, hinting at the applicability of pre-trained LLMs for OL.
摘要：大型语言模型在各种应用领域的各种自然语言处理任务中表现出了前所未有的能力。最近的研究表明，LLMS可以被用来执行词汇语义任务，如知识库补全(KBC)或本体学习(OL)。然而，他们的成功是否归功于他们对非结构化或半结构化数据的推理能力，还是他们对语言模式和意义的有效学习，目前还没有得到有效的验证。这个悬而未决的问题在处理特定领域的数据时尤其关键，因为在特定领域的数据中，词义及其含义可能与LLM在培训阶段学到的完全不同。本文研究了以下问题：LLM是否真的适应领域并在结构化知识的提取上保持一致，或者它们只学习词义而不学习推理？为了回答这个问题，我们设计了一个对照实验装置，使用WordNet合成具有英语和乱码的平行语料库。我们检查了在两个OL任务：关系提取和分类发现中，每个语料库的LLMS输出的差异。实证结果表明，在适应胡言乱语的语料库的同时，现成的LLM并不总是对概念之间的语义关系进行推理，而是利用意义及其框架。然而，微调提高了LLMS在词汇语义任务中的表现，即使特定于领域的术语在预训练期间是任意的和不可见的，这暗示了预训练的LLMS对OL的适用性。

[NLP-9] Confidence Estimation for Automatic Detection of Depression and Alzheimers Disease Based on Clinical Interviews INTERSPEECH2024
[NLP-9] 基于临床访谈自动检测抑郁症和阿尔茨海默病的置信度估计

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19984
作者: Wen Wu,Chao Zhang,Philip C. Woodland
关键词-EN: attracted increased attention, Speech-based automatic detection, Alzheimer disease, Speech-based automatic, detection of Alzheimer
关键词-ZN: 引起越来越多的关注，基于言语的自动检测，阿尔茨海默病，基于言语的自动检测，阿尔茨海默病的检测
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted by Interspeech 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Speech-based automatic detection of Alzheimer’s disease (AD) and depression has attracted increased attention. Confidence estimation is crucial for a trust-worthy automatic diagnostic system which informs the clinician about the confidence of model predictions and helps reduce the risk of misdiagnosis. This paper investigates confidence estimation for automatic detection of AD and depression based on clinical interviews. A novel Bayesian approach is proposed which uses a dynamic Dirichlet prior distribution to model the second-order probability of the predictive distribution. Experimental results on the publicly available ADReSS and DAIC-WOZ datasets demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms a range of baselines for both classification accuracy and confidence estimation.
摘要：基于语音的阿尔茨海默病（AD）和抑郁症自动检测越来越受到关注。置信度估计对于值得信赖的自动诊断系统至关重要，该系统向临床医生通报模型预测的置信度并有助于降低误诊风险。本文研究了基于临床访谈自动检测AD和抑郁症的置信度估计。提出了一种新颖的Bayesian方法，该方法使用动态Dirichlet先验分布来建模预测分布的二阶概率。在公开可用的ADReSS和DAIC-WOZ数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在分类准确性和置信度估计方面优于一系列基线。

[NLP-10] A Temporal Psycholinguistics Approach to Identity Resolution of Social Media Users
[NLP-10] 社交媒体用户身份解析的时间心理语言学方法

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19967
作者: Md Touhidul Islam
关键词-EN: social media platforms, identity resolution, resolution across social, social media, Disqus and Twitter
关键词-ZN: 社交媒体平台、身份解析、跨社交、社交媒体、Disqus和Twitter的解析
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this thesis, we propose an approach to identity resolution across social media platforms using the topics, sentiments, and timings of the posts on the platforms. After collecting the public posts of around 5000 profiles from Disqus and Twitter, we analyze their posts to match their profiles across the two platforms. We pursue both temporal and non-temporal methods in our analysis. While neither approach proves definitively superior, the temporal approach generally performs better. We found that the temporal window size influences results more than the shifting amount. On the other hand, our sentiment analysis shows that the inclusion of sentiment makes little difference, probably due to flawed data extraction methods. We also experimented with a distance-based reward-and-punishment-focused scoring model, which achieved an accuracy of 24.198% and an average rank of 158.217 out of 2525 in our collected corpus. Future work includes refining sentiment analysis by evaluating sentiments per topic, extending temporal analysis with additional phases, and improving the scoring model through weight adjustments and modified rewards.
摘要：在这篇论文中，我们提出了一种跨社交媒体平台的身份解析方法，利用平台上的帖子的主题、情感和时间进行解析。在从Disqus和Twitter上收集了大约5000个个人资料的公共帖子后，我们分析了他们的帖子，以匹配他们在这两个平台上的个人资料。在我们的分析中，我们同时采用时态和非时态方法。虽然这两种方法都被证明是绝对优越的，但时间方法通常表现得更好。我们发现，时间窗口大小对结果的影响比移动量更大。另一方面，我们的情感分析表明，情感的加入没有什么不同，可能是由于数据提取方法的缺陷。我们还实验了一种基于距离的奖惩评分模型，在我们收集的语料库中，它的准确率达到了24.198%，平均排名为158.217。未来的工作包括通过评估每个主题的情感来改进情感分析，通过增加阶段来扩展时间分析，以及通过调整权重和修改奖励来改进评分模型。

[NLP-11] Inference acceleration for large language models using “stairs” assisted greedy generation
[NLP-11] 使用“楼梯”辅助贪婪生成的大型语言模型的推理加速

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19947
作者: Domas Grigaliūnas,Mantas Lukoševičius
关键词-EN: impressive predicting capabilities, Large Language Models, Language Models, Large Language, billions of parameters
关键词-ZN: 令人印象深刻的预测能力、大型语言模型、语言模型、大型语言、数十亿个参数
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: Accepted at the 29th International Conference on Information Society and University Studies (IVUS 2024)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) with billions of parameters are known for their impressive predicting capabilities but require lots of resources to run. With their massive rise in popularity, even a small reduction in required resources could have an impact on environment. On the other hand, smaller models require fewer resources but may sacrifice accuracy. In this work, we are proposing an implementation of ``stairs’’ assisted greedy generation. It is a modified assisted generation methodology that makes use of a smaller model’s fast generation, large model’s batch prediction, and “stairs” validation in order to achieve a speed up in prediction generation. Results show between 9.58 and 17.24 percent inference time reduction compared to a stand-alone large LLM prediction in a text generation task without a loss in accuracy.
摘要：具有数十亿个参数的大型语言模型（LLM）以其令人印象深刻的预测能力而闻名，但需要大量资源来运行。随着它们的受欢迎程度的大幅上升，即使所需资源的小幅减少也可能对环境产生影响。另一方面，较小的模型需要更少的资源，但可能会牺牲准确性。在这项工作中，我们提议实现“楼梯”辅助贪婪生成。它是一种改进的辅助生成方法，利用较小模型的快速生成、大模型的批量预测和“阶梯”验证，以加快预测生成。结果显示，与文本生成任务中的独立大型LLM预测相比，推理时间减少了9.58%至17.24%，而准确性不会下降。

[NLP-12] Sentiment Analysis of Lithuanian Online Reviews Using Large Language Models
[NLP-12] 使用大型语言模型对立陶宛在线评论的情绪分析

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19914
作者: Brigita Vileikytė,Mantas Lukoševičius,Lukas Stankevičius
关键词-EN: Natural Language Processing, attracting significant interest, widely researched area, significant interest due, area within Natural
关键词-ZN: 自然语言处理，引起人们的极大兴趣，广泛研究领域，引起人们的极大兴趣，自然领域
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Information Retrieval (cs.IR); Machine Learning (cs.LG)
备注: Accepted at the 29th International Conference on Information Society and University Studies (IVUS 2024)

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Sentiment analysis is a widely researched area within Natural Language Processing (NLP), attracting significant interest due to the advent of automated solutions. Despite this, the task remains challenging because of the inherent complexity of languages and the subjective nature of sentiments. It is even more challenging for less-studied and less-resourced languages such as Lithuanian. Our review of existing Lithuanian NLP research reveals that traditional machine learning methods and classification algorithms have limited effectiveness for the task. In this work, we address sentiment analysis of Lithuanian five-star-based online reviews from multiple domains that we collect and clean. We apply transformer models to this task for the first time, exploring the capabilities of pre-trained multilingual Large Language Models (LLMs), specifically focusing on fine-tuning BERT and T5 models. Given the inherent difficulty of the task, the fine-tuned models perform quite well, especially when the sentiments themselves are less ambiguous: 80.74% and 89.61% testing recognition accuracy of the most popular one- and five-star reviews respectively. They significantly outperform current commercial state-of-the-art general-purpose LLM GPT-4. We openly share our fine-tuned LLMs online.
摘要：情感分析是自然语言处理中一个被广泛研究的领域，由于自动化解决方案的出现而引起了人们的极大兴趣。尽管如此，由于语言的内在复杂性和情感的主观性质，这项任务仍然具有挑战性。对于立陶宛语等学习较少、资源较少的语言来说，这甚至更具挑战性。我们对立陶宛现有的NLP研究进行了回顾，发现传统的机器学习方法和分类算法对这一任务的有效性有限。在这项工作中，我们解决了立陶宛基于五星的在线评论的情感分析，这些评论来自我们收集和清理的多个域。我们首次将转换器模型应用于这项任务，探索了预先培训的多语言大型语言模型(LLM)的功能，特别是微调BERT和T5模型。考虑到这项任务的固有难度，微调的模型表现得相当好，特别是当情绪本身不那么模糊的时候：分别测试最受欢迎的一星和五星评论的80.74%和89.61%的识别准确率。它们的性能远远超过目前商用最先进的通用LLMGPT-4。我们在网上公开分享我们微调的LLM。

[NLP-13] BEExAI: Benchmark to Evaluate Explainable AI
[NLP-13] BEExAI：评估可解释人工智能的基准

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19897
作者: Samuel Sithakoul,Sara Meftah,Clément Feutry
关键词-EN: post-hoc attribution methods, black-box machine learning, attribution methods aimed, numerous post-hoc attribution, Recent research
关键词-ZN: 事后归因方法、黑匣子机器学习、有针对性的归因方法、大量事后归因、最近的研究
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent research in explainability has given rise to numerous post-hoc attribution methods aimed at enhancing our comprehension of the outputs of black-box machine learning models. However, evaluating the quality of explanations lacks a cohesive approach and a consensus on the methodology for deriving quantitative metrics that gauge the efficacy of explainability post-hoc attribution methods. Furthermore, with the development of increasingly complex deep learning models for diverse data applications, the need for a reliable way of measuring the quality and correctness of explanations is becoming critical. We address this by proposing BEExAI, a benchmark tool that allows large-scale comparison of different post-hoc XAI methods, employing a set of selected evaluation metrics.
摘要：最近对可解释性的研究产生了许多事后归因方法，旨在增强我们对黑匣子机器学习模型输出的理解。然而，评估解释的质量缺乏连贯的方法，也缺乏对得出衡量可解释性事后归因方法有效性的量化指标的方法的共识。此外，随着针对不同数据应用程序的深度学习模型的开发日益复杂，对衡量解释质量和正确性的可靠方法的需求变得至关重要。我们通过提出BEExAI来解决这个问题，这是一种基准工具，允许使用一组选定的评估指标对不同的事后XAI方法进行大规模比较。

[NLP-14] Preliminary WMT24 Ranking of General MT Systems and LLMs
[NLP-14] WMT 24通用MT系统和LLM初步排名

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19884
作者: Tom Kocmi,Eleftherios Avramidis,Rachel Bawden,Ondrej Bojar,Anton Dvorkovich,Christian Federmann,Mark Fishel,Markus Freitag,Thamme Gowda,Roman Grundkiewicz,Barry Haddow,Marzena Karpinska,Philipp Koehn,Benjamin Marie,Kenton Murray,Masaaki Nagata,Martin Popel,Maja Popovic,Mariya Shmatova,Steinþór Steingrímsson,Vilém Zouhar
关键词-EN: automatic metrics, systems based, automatic ranking, preliminary ranking, based on automatic
关键词-ZN: 自动指标、基于系统、自动排名、初步排名、基于自动
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This is the preliminary ranking of WMT24 General MT systems based on automatic metrics. The official ranking will be a human evaluation, which is superior to the automatic ranking and supersedes it. The purpose of this report is not to interpret any findings but only provide preliminary results to the participants of the General MT task that may be useful during the writing of the system submission.
摘要：这是基于自动指标的WMT 24通用MT系统初步排名。官方排名将是人为评估，优于自动排名并取代自动排名。本报告的目的不是解释任何调查结果，而只是向一般MT任务的参与者提供在撰写系统提交文件期间可能有用的初步结果。

[NLP-15] Detecting and Understanding Vulnerabilities in Language Models via Mechanistic Interpretability
[NLP-15] 通过机械解释性检测和理解语言模型中的漏洞

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19842
作者: Jorge García-Carrasco,Alejandro Maté,Juan Trujillo
关键词-EN: Large Language Models, Large Language, shown impressive performance, wide range, Language Models
关键词-ZN: 大型语言模型，大型语言，表现出令人印象深刻的性能，范围广泛，语言模型
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Cryptography and Security (cs.CR)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs), characterized by being trained on broad amounts of data in a self-supervised manner, have shown impressive performance across a wide range of tasks. Indeed, their generative abilities have aroused interest on the application of LLMs across a wide range of contexts. However, neural networks in general, and LLMs in particular, are known to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks, where an imperceptible change to the input can mislead the output of the model. This is a serious concern that impedes the use of LLMs on high-stakes applications, such as healthcare, where a wrong prediction can imply serious consequences. Even though there are many efforts on making LLMs more robust to adversarial attacks, there are almost no works that study \emphhow and \emphwhere these vulnerabilities that make LLMs prone to adversarial attacks happen. Motivated by these facts, we explore how to localize and understand vulnerabilities, and propose a method, based on Mechanistic Interpretability (MI) techniques, to guide this process. Specifically, this method enables us to detect vulnerabilities related to a concrete task by (i) obtaining the subset of the model that is responsible for that task, (ii) generating adversarial samples for that task, and (iii) using MI techniques together with the previous samples to discover and understand the possible vulnerabilities. We showcase our method on a pretrained GPT-2 Small model carrying out the task of predicting 3-letter acronyms to demonstrate its effectiveness on locating and understanding concrete vulnerabilities of the model.
摘要：大型语言模型(LLM)的特点是以自我监督的方式对大量数据进行训练，在各种任务中表现出令人印象深刻的性能。事实上，他们的生成能力已经引起了人们对LLMS在广泛背景下的应用的兴趣。然而，一般的神经网络，特别是LLM，都很容易受到敌意攻击，在这种攻击中，输入的不可察觉的变化可能会误导模型的输出。这是一个严重的担忧，阻碍了低成本管理在高风险应用中的使用，例如医疗保健，在这些应用中，错误的预测可能意味着严重的后果。尽管有许多努力使LLM对对手攻击更健壮，但几乎没有作品研究这些使LLM容易受到对手攻击的漏洞是如何发生的。在这些事实的推动下，我们探索了如何定位和理解漏洞，并提出了一种基于机械可解释性(MI)技术的方法来指导这一过程。具体地说，这种方法使我们能够通过(I)获得负责该任务的模型的子集，(Ii)为该任务生成对抗性样本，以及(Iii)结合使用MI技术和先前的样本来发现和理解可能的漏洞来检测与该具体任务相关的漏洞。我们在一个预先训练的GPT-2小模型上展示了我们的方法，该模型执行了预测3字母首字母缩写的任务，以演示其在定位和理解模型的具体漏洞方面的有效性。

[NLP-16] ATHAR: A High-Quality and Diverse Dataset for Classical Arabic to English Translation
[NLP-16] ATHAR：用于古典阿拉伯语到英语翻译的高质量且多样化的数据集

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19835
作者: Mohammed Khalil,Mohammed Sabry
关键词-EN: Classical Arabic represents, age of Arab, Classical Arabic, Arab culture, high-quality Classical Arabic
关键词-ZN: 古典阿拉伯语代表，阿拉伯时代，古典阿拉伯语，阿拉伯文化，高品质的古典阿拉伯语
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Classical Arabic represents a significant era, encompassing the golden age of Arab culture, philosophy, and scientific literature. With a broad consensus on the importance of translating these literatures to enrich knowledge dissemination across communities, the advent of large language models (LLMs) and translation systems offers promising tools to facilitate this goal. However, we have identified a scarcity of translation datasets in Classical Arabic, which are often limited in scope and topics, hindering the development of high-quality translation systems. In response, we present the ATHAR dataset, comprising 66,000 high-quality Classical Arabic to English translation samples that cover a wide array of subjects including science, culture, and philosophy. Furthermore, we assess the performance of current state-of-the-art LLMs under various settings, concluding that there is a need for such datasets in current systems. Our findings highlight how models can benefit from fine-tuning or incorporating this dataset into their pretraining pipelines. The dataset is publicly available on the HuggingFace Data Hub at \urlthis https URL.
摘要：古阿拉伯语代表着一个重要的时代，包括阿拉伯文化、哲学和科学文学的黄金时代。随着对翻译这些文献以丰富跨社区知识传播的重要性达成了广泛的共识，大型语言模型(LLM)和翻译系统的出现为促进这一目标提供了有希望的工具。然而，我们发现缺乏古阿拉伯语翻译数据集，这些数据集往往在范围和主题上受到限制，阻碍了高质量翻译系统的开发。作为回应，我们提供了Athar数据集，包括66,000个高质量的古典阿拉伯语到英语的翻译样本，涵盖了包括科学、文化和哲学在内的广泛领域。此外，我们评估了当前最先进的LLMS在不同环境下的性能，得出结论是在当前的系统中需要这样的数据集。我们的发现突显了模型如何从微调或将此数据集纳入其预培训管道中受益。该数据集已在HuggingFace数据中心的此HTTPS URL上公开提供。

[NLP-17] ML-Mamba: Efficient Multi-Modal Large Language Model Utilizing Mamba-2
[NLP-17] ML-Mamba：利用Mamba-2的高效多模式大型语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19832
作者: Wenjun Huang,Jianguo Hu
关键词-EN: Multimodal Large Language, Large Language Models, Large Language, Multimodal Large, attracted much attention
关键词-ZN: 多模式大型语言、大型语言模型、大型语言、多模式大型，备受关注
类目: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have attracted much attention due to their multifunctionality. However, traditional Transformer architectures incur significant overhead due to their secondary computational complexity. To address this issue, we introduce ML-Mamba, a multimodal language model that utilizes the latest and efficient Mamba-2 model for inference. Mamba-2 is known for its linear extension and fast processing of long sequences. We replace the Transformer based backbone with a pre-trained Mamba-2 model and explore methods for integrating 2D visual selective scanning mechanisms into multimodal learning. We also try various visual encoders and Mamba-2 model variants. Our extensive experiments conducted in various multimodal benchmark tests have demonstrated the competitive performance of ML-Mamba and highlighted the potential of state space models in multimodal tasks. The experimental results show that: (1) ML-Mamba achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods such as TinyLaVA and MobileVLM v2 through its linear sequential modeling, while also having faster inference speed; (2) ML-Mamba performs well in visual hallucinations and spatial relationship judgment in closed set benchmark tests; (3) ML-Mamba achieves performance comparable to LLaVA while reducing the number of parameters by 40%.(4) Compared to the multimodal model using the original Mamba model, the Mamba-2 based large-scale multimodal language model has stronger inference performance and effectiveness.
摘要：多通道大型语言模型因其多功能性而备受关注。然而，传统的Transformer体系结构由于其二次计算复杂性而产生了大量的开销。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了ML-Mamba，一个利用最新的高效Mamba-2模型进行推理的多通道语言模型。Mamba-2以其线性扩展和对长序列的快速处理而闻名。我们用预先训练的MAMBA-2模型替换基于Transformer的主干，并探索将2D视觉选择性扫描机制集成到多模式学习中的方法。我们还尝试了各种视觉编码器和Mamba-2模型变体。我们在各种多通道基准测试中进行的广泛实验证明了ML-MAMBA的竞争性能，并突出了状态空间模型在多通道任务中的潜力。实验结果表明：(1)ML-Mamba通过其线性序贯建模获得了与TinyLaVA和MobileVLm v2等先进方法相当的性能，同时具有更快的推理速度；(2)在闭集基准测试中，ML-Mamba在视觉幻觉和空间关系判断方面表现良好；(3)ML-Mamba在减少参数40%的情况下达到了与LLaVA相当的性能。(4)与使用原始Mamba模型的多通道模型相比，基于Mamba-2的大规模多通道语言模型具有更强的推理性能和有效性。

[NLP-18] Concise Thoughts: Impact of Output Length on LLM Reasoning and Cost
[NLP-18] 简洁的想法：输出长度对LLM推理和成本的影响

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19825
作者: Sania Nayab,Giulio Rossolini,Giorgio Buttazzo,Nicolamaria Manes,Fabrizio Giacomelli
关键词-EN: Today large language, challenging question-answering tasks, solve challenging question-answering, Today large, large language models
关键词-ZN: 今天，大型语言，具有挑战性的问答任务，解决具有挑战性的问答，今天，大型语言模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Preprint version, under review

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Today’s large language models (LLMs) can solve challenging question-answering tasks, and prompt engineering techniques, such as chain-of-thought (CoT), have gained attention for enhancing the explanation and correctness of outputs. Nevertheless, models require significant time to generate answers augmented with lengthy reasoning details. To address this issue, this paper analyzes the impact of output lengths on LLM inference pipelines and proposes novel metrics to evaluate them in terms of \textitcorrect conciseness. It also examines the impact of controlling output length through a refined prompt engineering strategy, Constrained-CoT (CCoT), which encourages the model to limit output length. Experiments on pre-trained LLMs demonstrated the benefit of the proposed metrics and the effectiveness of CCoT across different models. For instance, constraining the reasoning of LLaMA2-70b to 100 words improves the accuracy from 36.01% (CoT) to 41.07% (CCoT) on the GSM8K dataset, while reducing the average output length by 28 words.
摘要：当今的大型语言模型(LLM)可以解决具有挑战性的问答任务，而快速工程技术，如思想链(COT)，已经得到了人们的关注，以提高输出的解释和正确性。然而，模型需要相当长的时间来生成带有冗长推理细节的答案。为了解决这个问题，本文分析了输出长度对LLM推理流水线的影响，并提出了一种新的度量标准来评估它们。它还考察了通过一种改进的即时工程策略-约束COT(CCoT)控制输出长度的影响，该策略鼓励模型限制输出长度。在预先训练的LLMS上的实验证明了所提出的度量的好处以及CCoT在不同模型上的有效性。例如，将LLaMA2-70b的推理限制在100个字以内，在GSM8K数据集上将准确率从36.01%(COT)提高到41.07%(CCoT)，同时将平均输出长度减少28个字。

[NLP-19] Comparative Analysis of Encoder-Based NER and Large Language Models for Skill Extraction from Russian Job Vacancies
[NLP-19] 基于编码器的NER和大型语言模型用于从俄罗斯职位空缺中提取技能的比较分析

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19816
作者: Nikita Matkin,Aleksei Smirnov,Mikhail Usanin,Egor Ivanov,Kirill Sobyanin,Sofiia Paklina,Petr Parshakov
关键词-EN: Named Entity Recognition, traditional NER models, undergoing rapid, increasing demands, traditional Named Entity
关键词-ZN: 命名实体识别，传统NER模型，需求迅速增加，传统命名实体
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The labor market is undergoing rapid changes, with increasing demands on job seekers and a surge in job openings. Identifying essential skills and competencies from job descriptions is challenging due to varying employer requirements and the omission of key skills. This study addresses these challenges by comparing traditional Named Entity Recognition (NER) methods based on encoders with Large Language Models (LLMs) for extracting skills from Russian job vacancies. Using a labeled dataset of 4,000 job vacancies for training and 1,472 for testing, the performance of both approaches is evaluated. Results indicate that traditional NER models, especially DeepPavlov RuBERT NER tuned, outperform LLMs across various metrics including accuracy, precision, recall, and inference time. The findings suggest that traditional NER models provide more effective and efficient solutions for skill extraction, enhancing job requirement clarity and aiding job seekers in aligning their qualifications with employer expectations. This research contributes to the field of natural language processing (NLP) and its application in the labor market, particularly in non-English contexts.
摘要：劳动力市场正在经历快速变化，求职者的需求不断增加，职位空缺激增。从职位描述中确定基本技能和能力是具有挑战性的，因为雇主的要求各不相同，关键技能也被遗漏了。本研究通过比较传统的基于编码和大语言模型的命名实体识别(NER)方法从俄语职位空缺中提取技能来解决这些挑战。使用4,000个用于培训的职位空缺和1,472个用于测试的标签数据集，对两种方法的性能进行了评估。结果表明，传统的NER模型，特别是DeepPavlov Rubert Ner优化的NER模型，在准确率、精确度、召回率和推理时间等多个指标上都优于LLMS。研究结果表明，传统的NER模型为技能提取提供了更有效和高效的解决方案，提高了工作要求的清晰度，并帮助求职者将自己的资格与雇主的期望保持一致。本研究对自然语言处理及其在劳动力市场中的应用，特别是在非英语环境中的应用做出了贡献。

[NLP-20] Improving Retrieval Augmented Language Model with Self-Reasoning
[NLP-20] 利用自我推理改进检索增强语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19813
作者: Yuan Xia,Jingbo Zhou,Zhenhui Shi,Jun Chen,Haifeng Huang
关键词-EN: Retrieval-Augmented Language Model, large language models, incorporating external knowledge, factual hallucinations inherited, shown remarkable performance
关键词-ZN: 检索-增强语言模型，大型语言模型，融入外部知识，继承的事实幻觉，表现出色
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The Retrieval-Augmented Language Model (RALM) has shown remarkable performance on knowledge-intensive tasks by incorporating external knowledge during inference, which mitigates the factual hallucinations inherited in large language models (LLMs). Despite these advancements, challenges persist in the implementation of RALMs, particularly concerning their reliability and traceability. To be specific, the irrelevant document retrieval may result in unhelpful response generation or even deteriorate the performance of LLMs, while the lack of proper citations in generated outputs complicates efforts to verify the trustworthiness of the models. To this end, we propose a novel self-reasoning framework aimed at improving the reliability and traceability of RALMs, whose core idea is to leverage reasoning trajectories generated by the LLM itself. The framework involves constructing self-reason trajectories with three processes: a relevance-aware process, an evidence-aware selective process, and a trajectory analysis process. We have evaluated our framework across four public datasets (two short-form QA datasets, one long-form QA dataset, and one fact verification dataset) to demonstrate the superiority of our method, which can outperform existing state-of-art models and can achieve comparable performance with GPT-4, while only using 2,000 training samples.
摘要：通过在推理过程中融入外部知识，检索增强语言模型(RALM)在知识密集型任务中表现出了显著的性能，它缓解了大型语言模型(LLM)中遗传的事实幻觉。尽管取得了这些进展，但区域土地管理系统的实施仍然面临挑战，特别是在其可靠性和可追溯性方面。具体地说，不相关的文件检索可能导致无益的响应生成，甚至恶化LLMS的性能，而生成的输出中缺乏适当的引用使验证模型可信度的努力复杂化。为此，我们提出了一种新的自推理框架，旨在提高RALMS的可靠性和可跟踪性，其核心思想是利用LLM本身生成的推理轨迹。该框架包括构建具有三个过程的自我推理轨迹：相关意识过程、证据意识选择过程和轨迹分析过程。我们已经在四个公共数据集(两个短形式的QA数据集、一个长形式的QA数据集和一个事实验证数据集)上对我们的框架进行了评估，以证明我们的方法的优越性，它可以超越现有的最新模型，并且可以在只使用2000个训练样本的情况下获得与GPT-4相当的性能。

[NLP-21] Segmentation en phrases : ouvrez les guillemets sans perdre le fil
[NLP-21] 分段短语：ouvrez les guillemets sans perdre le fil

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19808
作者: Sandrine Ollinger(ATILF),Denis Maurel
关键词-EN: XML documents, segmentation of XML, graph cascade, sentence segmentation, XML
关键词-ZN: HTML文档、HTML分段、图级联、句子分段、HTML
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: in French language

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper presents a graph cascade for sentence segmentation of XML documents. Our proposal offers sentences inside sentences for cases introduced by quotation marks and hyphens, and also pays particular attention to situations involving incises introduced by parentheses and lists introduced by colons. We present how the tool works and compare the results obtained with those available in 2019 on the same dataset, together with an evaluation of the system’s performance on a test corpus
摘要：本文提出了一种用于对HTML文档进行句子分割的图级联。我们的提案为由引号和连字符引入的情况提供句子内的句子，并且还特别关注涉及由括号引入的切入和由逗号引入的列表的情况。我们介绍了该工具的工作原理，并将获得的结果与2019年在同一数据集上获得的结果进行比较，以及对系统在测试数据库上的性能的评估

[NLP-22] Cool-Fusion: Fuse Large Language Models without Training
[NLP-22] Cool-Fusion：无需培训即可卸载大型语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19807
作者: Cong Liu,Xiaojun Quan,Yan Pan,Liang Lin,Weigang Wu,Xu Chen
关键词-EN: large language models, heterogeneous large language, source LLMs, problem of fusing, large language
关键词-ZN: 大型语言模型、异类大型语言、源LLM、融合问题、大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We focus on the problem of fusing two or more heterogeneous large language models (LLMs) to facilitate their complementary strengths. One of the challenges on model fusion is high computational load, i.e. to fine-tune or to align vocabularies via combinatorial optimization. To this end, we propose \emphCool-Fusion, a simple yet effective approach that fuses the knowledge of heterogeneous source LLMs to leverage their complementary strengths. \emphCool-Fusion is the first method that does not require any type of training like the ensemble approaches. But unlike ensemble methods, it is applicable to any set of source LLMs that have different vocabularies. The basic idea is to have each source LLM individually generate tokens until the tokens can be decoded into a text segment that ends at word boundaries common to all source LLMs. Then, the source LLMs jointly rerank the generated text segment and select the best one, which is the fused text generation in one step. Extensive experiments are conducted across a variety of benchmark datasets. On \emphGSM8K, \emphCool-Fusion increases accuracy from three strong source LLMs by a significant 8%-17.8%.
摘要：我们主要研究如何融合两个或多个不同种类的大型语言模型，以促进它们的优势互补。模型融合的挑战之一是高计算量，即通过组合优化来微调或对齐词汇表。为此，我们提出了Cool-Fusion，这是一种简单而有效的方法，它融合了不同来源的LLM的知识，以利用它们的互补优势。Cool-Fusion是第一种不需要像合奏方法那样进行任何类型的培训的方法。但与集成方法不同的是，它适用于具有不同词汇量的任何一组源LLM。基本思想是让每个源LLM单独生成令牌，直到这些令牌可以被解码成文本段，该文本段在所有源LLM共有的词边界处结束。然后，源LLMS联合对生成的文本片段进行重新排序并选择最优的文本片段，这是一步生成融合文本的过程。在各种基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验。在GSM8K上，Cool-Fusion将来自三个强源LLM的准确率显著提高了8-17.8%。

[NLP-23] aching LLMs at Charles University: Assignments and Activities ACL2024
[NLP-23] 查尔斯大学攻读法学硕士：课程和活动

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19798
作者: Jindřich Helcl,Zdeněk Kasner,Ondřej Dušek,Tomasz Limisiewicz,Dominik Macháček,Tomáš Musil,Jindřich Libovický
关键词-EN: presents teaching materials, large language models, Charles University, taught at Charles, paper presents teaching
关键词-ZN: 呈现教材，大型语言模型，查尔斯大学，在查尔斯任教，论文呈现教学
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: 6th TeachNLP workshop at ACL 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper presents teaching materials, particularly assignments and ideas for classroom activities, from a new course on large language models (LLMs) taught at Charles University. The assignments include experiments with LLM inference for weather report generation and machine translation. The classroom activities include class quizzes, focused research on downstream tasks and datasets, and an interactive “best paper” session aimed at reading and comprehension of research papers.
摘要：本文介绍了查尔斯大学教授的大型语言模型（LLM）新课程的教学材料，特别是课堂活动的作业和想法。作业包括用于天气报告生成和机器翻译的LLM推理实验。课堂活动包括课堂测验、对下游任务和数据集的重点研究，以及旨在阅读和理解研究论文的交互式“最佳论文”课程。

[NLP-24] VolDoGer: LLM-assisted Datasets for Domain Generalization in Vision-Language Tasks
[NLP-24] VolDoGer：LLM辅助的视觉语言任务领域概括数据集

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19795
作者: Juhwan Choi,Junehyoung Kwon,JungMin Yun,Seunguk Yu,YoungBin Kim
关键词-EN: Domain generalizability, deep learning model, deep learning, Domain Generalization, crucial aspect
关键词-ZN: 领域可概括性，深度学习模型，深度学习，领域可概括，关键方面
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (cs.CV)
备注: 31 pages, 5 figures, 20 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Domain generalizability is a crucial aspect of a deep learning model since it determines the capability of the model to perform well on data from unseen domains. However, research on the domain generalizability of deep learning models for vision-language tasks remains limited, primarily because of the lack of required datasets. To address these challenges, we propose VolDoGer: Vision-Language Dataset for Domain Generalization, a dedicated dataset designed for domain generalization that addresses three vision-language tasks: image captioning, visual question answering, and visual entailment. We constructed VolDoGer by extending LLM-based data annotation techniques to vision-language tasks, thereby alleviating the burden of recruiting human annotators. We evaluated the domain generalizability of various models, ranging from fine-tuned models to a recent multimodal large language model, through VolDoGer.
摘要：领域可概括性是深度学习模型的一个关键方面，因为它决定了模型在来自未见领域的数据上表现良好的能力。然而，关于视觉语言任务深度学习模型领域可概括性的研究仍然有限，主要是因为缺乏所需的数据集。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了VolDoGer：领域概括的视觉语言数据集，这是一个专为领域概括而设计的专用数据集，可解决三项视觉语言任务：图像字幕、视觉问答和视觉蕴含。我们通过将基于LLM的数据注释技术扩展到视觉语言任务来构建VolDoGer，从而减轻了招募人类注释者的负担。我们通过VolDoGer评估了各种模型的领域可概括性，从微调模型到最近的多模式大型语言模型。

[NLP-25] Introducing a new hyper-parameter for RAG: Context Window Utilization
[NLP-25] 引入RAG的新超参数：上下文窗口利用率

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19794
作者: Kush Juvekar,Anupam Purwar
关键词-EN: Context Window Utilization, Window Utilization, called Context Window, systems called Context, Context Window
关键词-ZN: 上下文窗口利用率，窗口利用率，称为上下文窗口，系统称为上下文，上下文窗口
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Emerging Technologies (cs.ET)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:This paper introduces a new hyper-parameter for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems called Context Window Utilization. RAG systems enhance generative models by incorporating relevant information retrieved from external knowledge bases, improving the factual accuracy and contextual relevance of generated responses. The size of the text chunks retrieved and processed is a critical factor influencing RAG performance. This study aims to identify the optimal chunk size that maximizes answer generation quality. Through systematic experimentation, we analyze the effects of varying chunk sizes on the efficiency and effectiveness of RAG frameworks. Our findings reveal that an optimal chunk size balances the trade-off between providing sufficient context and minimizing irrelevant information. These insights are crucial for enhancing the design and implementation of RAG systems, underscoring the importance of selecting an appropriate chunk size to achieve superior performance.
摘要：本文为检索增强生成（RAG）系统介绍了一个新的超参数，称为上下文窗口利用率。RAG系统通过合并从外部知识库检索的相关信息来增强生成模型，提高生成响应的事实准确性和上下文相关性。检索和处理的文本块的大小是影响RAG性能的关键因素。本研究旨在确定最大限度地提高答案生成质量的最佳块大小。通过系统实验，我们分析了不同块大小对RAG框架效率和有效性的影响。我们的研究结果表明，最佳的块大小可以平衡提供足够的上下文和最小化不相关信息之间的权衡。这些见解对于增强RAG系统的设计和实施至关重要，强调了选择适当的块大小以实现卓越性能的重要性。

[NLP-26] Synthesizing Scientific Summaries: An Extractive and Abstractive Approach
[NLP-26] 综合科学摘要：一种提取和抽象的方法

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19779
作者: Grishma Sharma,Aditi Paretkar,Deepak Sharma
关键词-EN: vast array, research, research paper summarisation, research papers, paper
关键词-ZN: 大量、研究、研究论文总结、研究论文、论文
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: the paper consists of 10 pages , 5 figures and 4 tables

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The availability of a vast array of research papers in any area of study, necessitates the need of automated summarisation systems that can present the key research conducted and their corresponding findings. Scientific paper summarisation is a challenging task for various reasons including token length limits in modern transformer models and corresponding memory and compute requirements for long text. A significant amount of work has been conducted in this area, with approaches that modify the attention mechanisms of existing transformer models and others that utilise discourse information to capture long range dependencies in research papers. In this paper, we propose a hybrid methodology for research paper summarisation which incorporates an extractive and abstractive approach. We use the extractive approach to capture the key findings of research, and pair it with the introduction of the paper which captures the motivation for research. We use two models based on unsupervised learning for the extraction stage and two transformer language models, resulting in four combinations for our hybrid approach. The performances of the models are evaluated on three metrics and we present our findings in this paper. We find that using certain combinations of hyper parameters, it is possible for automated summarisation systems to exceed the abstractiveness of summaries written by humans. Finally, we state our future scope of research in extending this methodology to summarisation of generalised long documents.
摘要：在任何研究领域都可以获得大量的研究论文，这就需要自动摘要系统来呈现所进行的关键研究及其相应的发现。科学论文摘要是一项具有挑战性的任务，原因很多，包括现代变压器模型中的标记长度限制以及相应的对长文本的内存和计算要求。在这一领域已经进行了大量的工作，采用了一些方法来修改现有转换器模型的注意机制，以及其他利用话语信息来捕获研究论文中的长范围依赖的方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合方法用于研究论文摘要，该方法结合了提取和抽象的方法。我们使用摘录的方法来获取研究的关键发现，并将其与论文的引言配对，该论文捕获了研究的动机。对于提取阶段，我们使用了两个基于无监督学习的模型和两个转换器语言模型，从而为我们的混合方法产生了四个组合。我们从三个方面对模型的性能进行了评估，并在本文中介绍了我们的发现。我们发现，使用某些超参数组合，自动摘要系统有可能超过人类编写的摘要的抽象性。最后，我们指出了我们未来的研究范围，将这一方法扩展到对一般性长篇文献的总结。

[NLP-27] Model Agnostic Hybrid Sharding For Heterogeneous Distributed Inference
[NLP-27] 用于异类分布式推理的模型不可知混合分片

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19775
作者: Claudio Angione,Yue Zhao,Harry Yang,Ahmad Farhan,Fielding Johnston,James Buban,Patrick Colangelo
关键词-EN: brought significant challenges, rapid growth, brought significant, significant challenges, computational resources
关键词-ZN: 带来了重大挑战，快速增长，带来了重大非常重大的挑战，计算资源
类目: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL); Cryptography and Security (cs.CR); Distributed, Parallel, and Cluster Computing (cs.DC)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The rapid growth of large-scale AI models, particularly large language models has brought significant challenges in data privacy, computational resources, and accessibility. Traditional centralized architectures often struggle to meet required data security and scalability needs which hinders the democratization of AI systems. Nesa introduces a model-agnostic sharding framework designed for decentralized AI inference. Our framework uses blockchain-based sequential deep neural network sharding to distribute computational tasks across a diverse network of nodes based on a personalised heuristic and routing mechanism. This enables efficient distributed training and inference for recent large-scale models even on consumer-grade hardware. We use compression techniques like dynamic blockwise quantization and mixed matrix decomposition to reduce data transfer and memory needs. We also integrate robust security measures, including hardware-based trusted execution environments to ensure data integrity and confidentiality. Evaluating our system across various natural language processing and vision tasks shows that these compression strategies do not compromise model accuracy. Our results highlight the potential to democratize access to cutting-edge AI technologies by enabling secure and efficient inference on a decentralized network.
摘要：大规模人工智能模型的快速增长，特别是大型语言模型的快速增长，给数据隐私、计算资源和可访问性带来了巨大的挑战。传统的集中式架构往往难以满足所需的数据安全性和可扩展性需求，这阻碍了人工智能系统的民主化。NESA引入了一个与模型无关的分片框架，旨在进行分散的人工智能推理。我们的框架使用基于区块链的顺序深度神经网络分片，基于个性化的启发式和路由机制，在不同的节点网络上分配计算任务。这使得即使在消费级硬件上也能对最新的大规模模型进行高效的分布式培训和推理。我们使用动态块量化和混合矩阵分解等压缩技术来减少数据传输和存储需求。我们还集成了强大的安全措施，包括基于硬件的可信执行环境，以确保数据的完整性和保密性。在各种自然语言处理和视觉任务上对我们的系统进行评估表明，这些压缩策略不会影响模型的准确性。我们的结果突出了通过在分散的网络上实现安全和高效的推理，使对尖端人工智能技术的访问民主化的潜力。

[NLP-28] Legal Minds Algorithmic Decisions: How LLMs Apply Constitutional Principles in Complex Scenarios
[NLP-28] 法律头脑的数学决策：法学硕士如何在复杂场景中应用宪法原则

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19760
作者: Camilla Bignotti,Carolina Camassa
关键词-EN: large language models, interpret constitutional principles, Italian Constitutional Court, language models, interpret constitutional
关键词-ZN: 大语言模型，解释宪法原则，意大利宪法法院，语言模型，解释宪法
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Computers and Society (cs.CY)
备注: Accepted at AIES24

点击查看摘要

Abstract:In this paper, we conduct an empirical analysis of how large language models (LLMs), specifically GPT-4, interpret constitutional principles in complex decision-making scenarios. We examine rulings from the Italian Constitutional Court on bioethics issues that involve trade-offs between competing values and compare model-generated legal arguments on these issues to those presented by the State, the Court, and the applicants. Our results indicate that GPT-4 consistently aligns more closely with progressive interpretations of the Constitution, often overlooking competing values and mirroring the applicants’ views rather than the more conservative perspectives of the State or the Court’s moderate positions. Our experiments reveal a distinct tendency of GPT-4 to favor progressive legal interpretations, underscoring the influence of underlying data biases. We thus underscore the importance of testing alignment in real-world scenarios and considering the implications of deploying LLMs in decision-making processes.
摘要：在本文中，我们对大型语言模型(LLM)，特别是GPT-4如何在复杂的决策场景中解释宪法原则进行了实证分析。我们审查意大利宪法法院关于生物伦理问题的裁决，这些裁决涉及相互竞争的价值观之间的权衡，并将模型生成的关于这些问题的法律论点与国家、法院和申请人提出的法律论点进行比较。我们的结果表明，GPT-4始终与对宪法的进步解释更紧密地一致，往往忽略了相互竞争的价值观，反映了申请者的观点，而不是国家或法院温和立场的更保守的观点。我们的实验显示，GPT-4有一个明显的倾向，倾向于渐进的法律解释，强调了潜在数据偏差的影响。因此，我们强调在现实世界情景中测试一致性的重要性，并考虑在决策过程中部署低成本管理的影响。

[NLP-29] KNOWCOMP POKEMON Team at DialAM-2024: A Two-Stage Pipeline for Detecting Relations in Dialogical Argument Mining
[NLP-29] KNOWCOG POKEMON团队出席DialAM-2024：用于检测对话论点挖掘中关系的两阶段管道

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19740
作者: Zihao Zheng,Zhaowei Wang,Qing Zong,Yangqiu Song
关键词-EN: Dialogical Argument Mining, Argument Mining, Dialogical Argument, Mining, Prediction Model
关键词-ZN: 对话论点挖掘，论点挖掘，对话论点，挖掘，预测模型
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注: Published on the 11th Workshop on Argument Mining

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Dialogical Argument Mining(DialAM) is an important branch of Argument Mining(AM). DialAM-2024 is a shared task focusing on dialogical argument mining, which requires us to identify argumentative relations and illocutionary relations among proposition nodes and locution nodes. To accomplish this, we propose a two-stage pipeline, which includes the Two-Step S-Node Prediction Model in Stage 1 and the YA-Node Prediction Model in Stage 2. We also augment the training data in both stages and introduce context in Stage 2. We successfully completed the task and achieved good results. Our team Pokemon ranked 1st in the ARI Focused score and 4th in the Global Focused score.
摘要：对话论据挖掘（DialAM）是论据挖掘（AM）的一个重要分支。DialAM-2024是一项专注于对话论点挖掘的共享任务，它要求我们识别命题节点和言内节点之间的论点关系和言外关系。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一个两阶段流水线，其中包括阶段1中的两步S节点预测模型和阶段2中的YA节点预测模型。我们还在两个阶段中增强训练数据，并在第2阶段引入上下文。我们圆满完成了任务，取得了良好的效果。我们的Pokemon团队在ARI Focused评分中排名第一，在Global Focused评分中排名第四。

[NLP-30] Do Text-to-Vis Benchmarks Test Real Use of Visualisations?
[NLP-30] 文本到视觉基准测试可视化的实际使用吗？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19726
作者: Hy Nguyen,Xuefei He,Andrew Reeson,Cecile Paris,Josiah Poon,Jonathan K. Kummerfeld
关键词-EN: Large language models, Large language, Large, language models, user requests
关键词-ZN: 大型语言模型，大型语言，大型，语言模型，用户请求
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Human-Computer Interaction (cs.HC)
备注: ARR AE score of 4

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large language models are able to generate code for visualisations in response to user requests. This is a useful application, and an appealing one for NLP research because plots of data provide grounding for language. However, there are relatively few benchmarks, and it is unknown whether those that exist are representative of what people do in practice. This paper aims to answer that question through an empirical study comparing benchmark datasets and code from public repositories. Our findings reveal a substantial gap in datasets, with evaluations not testing the same distribution of chart types, attributes, and the number of actions. The only representative dataset requires modification to become an end-to-end and practical benchmark. This shows that new, more benchmarks are needed to support the development of systems that truly address users’ visualisation needs. These observations will guide future data creation, highlighting which features hold genuine significance for users.
摘要：大型语言模型能够响应用户请求生成可视化代码。这是一个有用的应用程序，对于NLP研究来说也是一个有吸引力的应用程序，因为数据情节为语言提供了基础。然而，基准相对较少，而且尚不清楚现有的基准是否代表人们在实践中所做的事情。本文旨在通过比较基准数据集和来自公共存储库的代码的实证研究来回答这个问题。我们的发现揭示了数据集的巨大差距，评估没有测试图表类型、属性和操作数量的相同分布。唯一具有代表性的数据集需要修改才能成为端到端和实用的基准。这表明，需要新的、更多的基准来支持开发真正满足用户可视化需求的系统。这些观察将指导未来的数据创建，强调哪些功能对用户具有真正的意义。

[NLP-31] CollectiveSFT: Scaling Large Language Models for Chinese Medical Benchmark with Collective Instructions in Healthcare
[NLP-31] CollectiveSFT：通过医疗保健的集体说明扩展中国医学基准的大型语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19705
作者: Jingwei Zhu,Minghuan Tan,Min Yang,Ruixue Li,Hamid Alinejad-Rokny
关键词-EN: Comprehensive Medical Benchmark, Large Language Models, http URL integrating, enhance LLM performance.Remarkably, achieve scores comparable
关键词-ZN: 全面的医学基准、大型语言模型、http URL集成，提高LLM绩效。令人瞩目的是，取得了相当的分数
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:The rapid progress in Large Language Models (LLMs) has prompted the creation of numerous benchmarks to evaluate their capabilities.This study focuses on the Comprehensive Medical Benchmark in Chinese (CMB), showcasing how dataset diversity and distribution in supervised fine-tuning (SFT) may enhance LLM performance.Remarkably, We successfully trained a smaller base model to achieve scores comparable to larger models, indicating that a diverse and well-distributed dataset can optimize performance regardless of model size.This study suggests that even smaller models may reach high performance levels with carefully curated and varied this http URL integrating a wide range of instructional content, our approach addresses potential issues such as data quality inconsistencies. Our results imply that a broader spectrum of training data may enhance a model’s ability to generalize and perform effectively across different medical scenarios, highlighting the importance of dataset quality and diversity in fine-tuning processes.
摘要：大型语言模型的快速发展催生了许多评估其能力的基准。这项研究集中在中文综合医学基准(CMB)上，展示了监督微调(SFT)中数据集的多样性和分布如何提高LLM的性能。值得注意的是，我们成功地训练了一个较小的基本模型来获得与较大模型相当的分数，表明无论模型大小，多样化和分布良好的数据集都可以优化性能。本研究表明，即使是较小的模型也可以达到高性能水平，精心管理和多样化的http URL集成了广泛的教学内容，我们的方法解决了潜在的问题，如数据质量不一致。我们的结果表明，更广泛的训练数据范围可能会增强模型在不同医疗场景中的泛化和有效执行的能力，突出了数据集质量和多样性在微调过程中的重要性。

[NLP-32] Efficiently and Effectively: A Two-stage Approach to Balance Plaintext and Encrypted Text for Traffic Classification
[NLP-32] 高效且有效：平衡明文和加密文本以进行流量分类的两阶段方法

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19687
作者: Wei Peng
关键词-EN: encrypted text, encrypted network traffic, Encrypted, raw traffic bytes, traffic
关键词-ZN: 加密文本、加密网络流量、加密、原始流量字节、流量
类目: Cryptography and Security (cs.CR); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Encrypted traffic classification is the task of identifying the application or service associated with encrypted network traffic. One effective approach for this task is to use deep learning methods to encode the raw traffic bytes directly and automatically extract features for classification (byte-based models). However, current byte-based models input raw traffic bytes, whether plaintext or encrypted text, for automated feature extraction, neglecting the distinct impacts of plaintext and encrypted text on downstream tasks. Additionally, these models primarily focus on improving classification accuracy, with little emphasis on the efficiency of models. In this paper, for the first time, we analyze the impact of plaintext and encrypted text on the model’s effectiveness and efficiency. Based on our observations and findings, we propose a two-phase approach to balance the trade-off between plaintext and encrypted text in traffic classification. Specifically, Stage one is to Determine whether the Plain text is enough to be accurately Classified (DPC) using the proposed DPC Selector. This stage quickly identifies samples that can be classified using plaintext, leveraging explicit byte features in plaintext to enhance model’s efficiency. Stage two aims to adaptively make a classification with the result from stage one. This stage incorporates encrypted text information for samples that cannot be classified using plaintext alone, ensuring the model’s effectiveness on traffic classification tasks. Experiments on two datasets demonstrate that our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art results in both effectiveness and efficiency.
摘要：加密流量分类是识别与加密网络流量相关联的应用或服务的任务。一种有效的方法是使用深度学习方法直接对原始流量字节进行编码，并自动提取用于分类的特征(基于字节的模型)。然而，当前基于字节的模型输入原始流量字节，无论是明文还是密文，用于自动特征提取，忽略了明文和密文对下游任务的不同影响。此外，这些模型主要侧重于提高分类精度，很少强调模型的效率。本文首次分析了明文和密文对模型有效性和效率的影响。基于我们的观察和发现，我们提出了一种两阶段的方法来平衡明文和密文在流量分类中的权衡。具体地说，第一阶段是确定纯文本是否足以使用建议的DPC选择器进行准确分类(DPC)。该阶段利用明文中的显式字节特征来提高模型的效率，从而快速识别可以使用明文进行分类的样本。第二阶段旨在根据第一阶段的结果自适应地进行分类。此阶段包含仅使用明文无法分类的样本的加密文本信息，以确保该模型在流量分类任务中的有效性。在两个数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的模型在有效性和效率方面都取得了最好的结果。

[NLP-33] SeaLLMs 3: Open Foundation and Chat Multilingual Large Language Models for Southeast Asian Languages
[NLP-33] SeaLLMS 3：面向东南亚语言的开放基金会和聊天多语言大型语言模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19672
作者: Wenxuan Zhang,Hou Pong Chan,Yiran Zhao,Mahani Aljunied,Jianyu Wang,Chaoqun Liu,Yue Deng,Zhiqiang Hu,Weiwen Xu,Yew Ken Chia,Xin Li,Lidong Bing
关键词-EN: shown remarkable abilities, Large Language Models, leaving low-resource languages, Southeast Asian languages, Large Language
关键词-ZN: 表现出非凡的能力，大型语言模型，留下低资源语言，东南亚语言，大型语言
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown remarkable abilities across various tasks, yet their development has predominantly centered on high-resource languages like English and Chinese, leaving low-resource languages underserved. To address this disparity, we present SeaLLMs 3, the latest iteration of the SeaLLMs model family, tailored for Southeast Asian languages. This region, characterized by its rich linguistic diversity, has lacked adequate language technology support. SeaLLMs 3 aims to bridge this gap by covering a comprehensive range of languages spoken in this region, including English, Chinese, Indonesian, Vietnamese, Thai, Tagalog, Malay, Burmese, Khmer, Lao, Tamil, and Javanese. Leveraging efficient language enhancement techniques and a specially constructed instruction tuning dataset, SeaLLMs 3 significantly reduces training costs while maintaining high performance and versatility. Our model excels in tasks such as world knowledge, mathematical reasoning, translation, and instruction following, achieving state-of-the-art performance among similarly sized models. Additionally, we prioritized safety and reliability by addressing both general and culture-specific considerations and incorporated mechanisms to reduce hallucinations. This work underscores the importance of inclusive AI, showing that advanced LLM capabilities can benefit underserved linguistic and cultural communities.
摘要：大型语言模型在各种任务中表现出了卓越的能力，但它们的发展主要集中在英语和汉语等高资源语言上，而低资源语言的服务不足。为了解决这种差异，我们推出了SeaLLMS 3，这是SeaLLMS模型家族的最新迭代，为东南亚语言量身定做。该区域以其丰富的语言多样性为特点，缺乏足够的语言技术支持。SeaLLMS 3旨在通过涵盖该地区使用的各种语言来弥合这一差距，包括英语、汉语、印度尼西亚语、越南语、泰语、他加路语、马来语、缅甸语、高棉语、老挝语、泰米尔语和爪哇语。SeaLLMS 3利用高效的语言增强技术和专门构建的指令调优数据集，在保持高性能和多功能性的同时显著降低了培训成本。我们的模型在世界知识、数学推理、翻译和指令遵循等任务中表现出色，在类似大小的模型中实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们将安全性和可靠性放在首位，解决了一般和特定文化方面的考虑，并纳入了减少幻觉的机制。这项工作强调了包容性人工智能的重要性，表明先进的LLM能力可以造福于服务不足的语言和文化社区。

[NLP-34] Overview of PerpectiveArg2024: The First Shared Task on Perspective Argument Retrieval
[NLP-34] PerpectiveArg2024概览：关于透视参数检索的第一个共享任务

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19670
作者: Neele Falk,Andreas Waldis,Iryna Gurevych
关键词-EN: finding relevant arguments, finding relevant, retrieval, Argument retrieval, perspective argument retrieval
关键词-ZN: 查找相关论点、查找相关、检索、论点检索、观点论点检索
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Argument retrieval is the task of finding relevant arguments for a given query. While existing approaches rely solely on the semantic alignment of queries and arguments, this first shared task on perspective argument retrieval incorporates perspectives during retrieval, accounting for latent influences in argumentation. We present a novel multilingual dataset covering demographic and socio-cultural (socio) variables, such as age, gender, and political attitude, representing minority and majority groups in society. We distinguish between three scenarios to explore how retrieval systems consider explicitly (in both query and corpus) and implicitly (only in query) formulated perspectives. This paper provides an overview of this shared task and summarizes the results of the six submitted systems. We find substantial challenges in incorporating perspectivism, especially when aiming for personalization based solely on the text of arguments without explicitly providing socio profiles. Moreover, retrieval systems tend to be biased towards the majority group but partially mitigate bias for the female gender. While we bootstrap perspective argument retrieval, further research is essential to optimize retrieval systems to facilitate personalization and reduce polarization.
摘要：论元检索是为给定查询找到相关论元的任务。虽然现有的方法仅依赖于查询和论点的语义对齐，但这项关于透视论点检索的第一个共享任务在检索过程中纳入了视角，考虑到了对论证的潜在影响。我们提出了一个新的多语言数据集，涵盖了人口和社会文化(社会)变量，如年龄、性别和政治态度，代表了社会中的少数群体和多数群体。我们区分三种场景来探索检索系统如何考虑显式(在查询和语料库中)和隐式(仅在查询中)表达的视角。本文件概述了这项共同任务，并概述了提交的六个系统的成果。我们发现，在纳入透视主义方面存在着巨大的挑战，特别是在仅基于论点文本而没有明确提供社会概况的情况下，旨在实现个性化。此外，检索系统倾向于偏向多数群体，但部分缓解了对女性的偏见。在我们引导观点论点检索的同时，进一步的研究是必要的，以优化检索系统以促进个性化和减少两极分化。

[NLP-35] mGTE: Generalized Long-Context Text Representation and Reranking Models for Multilingual Text Retrieval
[NLP-35] mGTE：用于多语言文本检索的广义长上下文文本表示和重新排序模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19669
作者: Xin Zhang,Yanzhao Zhang,Dingkun Long,Wen Xie,Ziqi Dai,Jialong Tang,Huan Lin,Baosong Yang,Pengjun Xie,Fei Huang,Meishan Zhang,Wenjie Li,Min Zhang
关键词-EN: present systematic efforts, multilingual text representation, building long-context multilingual, present systematic, systematic efforts
关键词-ZN: 当前系统性的努力，多语言文本表示，构建长上下文多语言，当前系统性的、系统性的努力
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Information Retrieval (cs.IR)
备注: 20 pages, 5 figures

点击查看摘要

Abstract:We present systematic efforts in building long-context multilingual text representation model (TRM) and reranker from scratch for text retrieval. We first introduce a text encoder (base size) enhanced with RoPE and unpadding, pre-trained in a native 8192-token context (longer than 512 of previous multilingual encoders). Then we construct a hybrid TRM and a cross-encoder reranker by contrastive learning. Evaluations show that our text encoder outperforms the same-sized previous state-of-the-art XLM-R. Meanwhile, our TRM and reranker match the performance of large-sized state-of-the-art BGE-M3 models and achieve better results on long-context retrieval benchmarks. Further analysis demonstrate that our proposed models exhibit higher efficiency during both training and inference. We believe their efficiency and effectiveness could benefit various researches and industrial applications.
摘要：我们系统地努力构建长上下文多语言文本表示模型（TRM）和从头开始进行文本检索重排序。我们首先引入一个通过RoPE和unpadding增强的文本编码器（基本大小），在原生8192令牌上下文中预训练（比之前的512个多语言编码器长）。然后我们通过对比学习构建混合TRM和交叉编码器重排序器。评估表明，我们的文本编码器优于相同大小的先前最先进的XLM-R。与此同时，我们的TRM和重排序器与大型最先进的BGE-M3模型的性能相匹配，并在长上下文检索基准上实现更好的结果。进一步的分析表明，我们提出的模型在训练和推理期间都表现出更高的效率。我们相信它们的效率和有效性可以使各种研究和工业应用受益。

[NLP-36] From Pre-training Corpora to Large Language Models : What Factors Influence LLM Performance in Causal Discovery Tasks?
[NLP-36] 从预训练库到大型语言模型：哪些因素影响LLM在因果发现任务中的表现？

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19638
作者: Tao Feng,Lizhen Qu,Niket Tandon,Zhuang Li,Xiaoxi Kang,Gholamreza Haffari
关键词-EN: Large Language Models, Large Language, causal discovery tasks, demonstrate notable proficiency, Recent advances
关键词-ZN: 大型语言模型、大型语言、因果发现任务、表现出显着的熟练程度、最新进展
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注:

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Recent advances in artificial intelligence have seen Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate notable proficiency in causal discovery tasks. This study explores the factors influencing the performance of LLMs in causal discovery tasks. Utilizing open-source LLMs, we examine how the frequency of causal relations within their pre-training corpora affects their ability to accurately respond to causal discovery queries. Our findings reveal that a higher frequency of causal mentions correlates with better model performance, suggesting that extensive exposure to causal information during training enhances the models’ causal discovery capabilities. Additionally, we investigate the impact of context on the validity of causal relations. Our results indicate that LLMs might exhibit divergent predictions for identical causal relations when presented in different contexts. This paper provides the first comprehensive analysis of how different factors contribute to LLM performance in causal discovery tasks.
摘要：在人工智能的最新进展中，大型语言模型(LLM)在因果发现任务中表现出了显著的熟练程度。本研究探讨了影响LLMS因果发现任务绩效的因素。利用开源的LLMS，我们检查了他们的预培训语料库中因果关系的频率如何影响他们准确响应因果发现查询的能力。我们的发现表明，更高的因果提及频率与更好的模型性能相关，这表明在培训期间广泛接触因果信息可以增强模型的因果发现能力。此外，我们还考察了语境对因果关系有效性的影响。我们的结果表明，当在不同的语境中呈现相同的因果关系时，LLM可能会对相同的因果关系表现出不同的预测。本文首次全面分析了在因果发现任务中不同因素对LLM性能的影响。

[NLP-37] LoginMEA: Local-to-Global Interaction Network for Multi-modal Entity Alignment ECAI2024
[NLP-37] LoginEMA：用于多模式实体协调的本地到全球互动网络

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19625
作者: Taoyu Su,Xinghua Zhang,Jiawei Sheng,Zhenyu Zhang,Tingwen Liu
关键词-EN: identify equivalent entities, aims to identify, related images, identify equivalent, triples and related
关键词-ZN: 识别等效实体，旨在识别相关图像，识别等效、三重和相关
类目: Computation and Language (cs.CL); Multimedia (cs.MM)
备注: Accepted by ECAI 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Multi-modal entity alignment (MMEA) aims to identify equivalent entities between two multi-modal knowledge graphs (MMKGs), whose entities can be associated with relational triples and related images. Most previous studies treat the graph structure as a special modality, and fuse different modality information with separate uni-modal encoders, neglecting valuable relational associations in modalities. Other studies refine each uni-modal information with graph structures, but may introduce unnecessary relations in specific modalities. To this end, we propose a novel local-to-global interaction network for MMEA, termed as LoginMEA. Particularly, we first fuse local multi-modal interactions to generate holistic entity semantics and then refine them with global relational interactions of entity neighbors. In this design, the uni-modal information is fused adaptively, and can be refined with relations accordingly. To enrich local interactions of multi-modal entity information, we device modality weights and low-rank interactive fusion, allowing diverse impacts and element-level interactions among modalities. To capture global interactions of graph structures, we adopt relation reflection graph attention networks, which fully capture relational associations between entities. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior results of our method over 5 cross-KG or bilingual benchmark datasets, indicating the effectiveness of capturing local and global interactions.
摘要：多通道实体对齐(MMEA)旨在识别两个多通道知识图(MMKG)之间的等价实体，其实体可以与关系三元组和相关图像相关联。以往的研究大多将图形结构视为一种特殊的通道，将不同的通道信息与单独的单通道编码器进行融合，忽略了通道中有价值的关系关联。其他研究用图形结构提炼每个单通道信息，但可能在特定通道中引入不必要的关系。为此，我们提出了一种新的局部到全局的MMEA交互网络，称为LoginMEA。具体地说，我们首先融合局部多通道交互来生成整体实体语义，然后用实体邻居的全局关系交互来提炼它们。在该设计中，单模态信息被自适应地融合，并可以根据关系进行相应的精化。为了丰富多通道实体信息的局部交互，我们设计了通道权重和低等级交互融合，允许不同的影响和通道之间的元素级交互。为了捕捉图结构的全局交互，我们采用了关系映射图关注网络，它充分捕捉了实体之间的关系关联。大量实验表明，在5个跨KG或双语基准数据集上，我们的方法取得了优越的结果，表明了该方法捕获局部和全局交互的有效性。

[NLP-38] opicTag: Automatic Annotation of NMF Topic Models Using Chain of Thought and Prompt Tuning with LLMs
[NLP-38] opicTAG：使用思维链和LLM即时调优自动注释NMF主题模型

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19616
作者: Selma Wanna,Ryan Barron,Nick Solovyev,Maksim E. Eren,Manish Bhattarai,Kim Rasmussen,Boian S. Alexandrov
关键词-EN: unstructured text, technique for organizing, organizing and extracting, extracting themes, collections of unstructured
关键词-ZN: 非结构化文本、组织、组织和提取技术、提取主题、非结构化集合
类目: Machine Learning (cs.LG); Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI); Computation and Language (cs.CL)
备注: Accepted to ACM Symposium on Document Engineering 2024 (DocEng 24), 2024

点击查看摘要

Abstract:Topic modeling is a technique for organizing and extracting themes from large collections of unstructured text. Non-negative matrix factorization (NMF) is a common unsupervised approach that decomposes a term frequency-inverse document frequency (TF-IDF) matrix to uncover latent topics and segment the dataset accordingly. While useful for highlighting patterns and clustering documents, NMF does not provide explicit topic labels, necessitating subject matter experts (SMEs) to assign labels manually. We present a methodology for automating topic labeling in documents clustered via NMF with automatic model determination (NMFk). By leveraging the output of NMFk and employing prompt engineering, we utilize large language models (LLMs) to generate accurate topic labels. Our case study on over 34,000 scientific abstracts on Knowledge Graphs demonstrates the effectiveness of our method in enhancing knowledge management and document organization.
摘要：主题建模是一种从大量非结构化文本集合中组织和提取主题的技术。非负矩阵分解（NMF）是一种常见的无监督方法，它分解术语频率-逆文档频率（TF-IDF）矩阵以发现潜在主题并相应地分割数据集。虽然NMF对于突出显示模式和集群文档很有用，但它不提供明确的主题标签，因此需要主题专家（SME）手动分配标签。我们提出了一种通过自动模型确定（NMFk）在通过NMF聚集的文档中自动进行主题标签的方法。通过利用NMFk的输出并采用即时工程，我们利用大型语言模型（LLM）来生成准确的主题标签。我们对知识图上34，000多份科学摘要的案例研究证明了我们的方法在增强知识管理和文档组织方面的有效性。

[NLP-39] You shall know a piece by the company it keeps. Chess plays as a data for word2vec models
[NLP-39] 你会知道它所经营的公司的一件作品。国际象棋充当word 2vec模型的数据

链接: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.19600
作者: Boris Orekhov
关键词-EN: apply linguistic methods, metaphorically equating, seeking analogies, apply linguistic, analysis to non-linguistic
